profile.major: Arts, Technology & the Business of Innovation
profile.belief: Subtracting ruthlessly until each remaining element carries the weight of the whole
profile.working_on: reconstructing every package curve until nothing exists except what the product demands

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a desire for purity in design, seeking to elevate the essence of the product above all distractions.
